publishedAbstract: * OCS operator pod encountering errors during upgrade from v4.21.1 to v4.21.2 * The following error message is firing in the ocs-operator pod: ~~~ "msg":"Failed to create/update Deployment for Blackbox Exporter" ~~~
publishedTitle: "Failed to create/update Deployment for Blackbox Exporter"  in OCS Operator Pod Post ODF v4.22.x Upgrade in Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
